text: In the first scene, I feel a curious detachment, as if standing at the sterile threshold of innovation—clean glass, cold lines, everything carefully designed yet devoid of warmth. In the second scene, color and ideas rush at me in contrast. The "R + D" wall feels vibrant, alive with exploration, inviting my thoughts to play among inventions and human inklings. It is a place where wonder stirs, yet I am aware of my role as both observer and participant in the ceaseless dance between creation and contemplation.
